title: Creahaus 12in 3 Layer Multipurpose Storage Box/Craft Storage Boxes With Compartments/Plastic Tool Box/Medicine Storage Box/Hair Accessories Organiser/Sewing Box with 2 Trays (Blue Purple)
features: 【Ample Capacity】 12" Craft Box Size: 12" x 7" x 6", 3 tiers, 2 trays. Upgraded craft storage boxes with compartments, perfect to help items placement, can meet different storage needs, such as tool box, sewing box, first aid storage box, fishing tackle box, hair accessories organiser, medicine storage box, nail box storage box, etc.

【High Quality Storage Box】 This art box is made of high quality material, light weight, long service life, dustproof and moisture-proof. The pretty storage boxes with lid is sturdy and durable, drop-proof and not easy to deform. We have added a new pin configuration to each plastic organiser box, which can bring you a better using experience.

【Cute Colour Options】 Eco-friendly and cute tackle box with handle on the lip, very easy to carry, three super cute colours to choose from, not only kids, adults will also like this cute handmade tool box!

【Efficient Storage】 The tray of this craft storage box is connected to the box itself by some brackets, and when you open the lid, various items will be presented to you in order for easy access. Let you no longer worry about not being able to find what you need.

【Happiness Delivered】 We are always committed to providing better service and better quality products. If you have any questions about 3 Layer Storage Box, please feel free to contact us, we will be happy to serve you.
description: Product Description 12in Three-Layer Multipurpose Storage Box Organizer Folding Tool Box / Art & Crafts Case / Sewing Supplies Organizer / Medicine Box / First Aid Box Cute plastic storage box perfect for storage of crafts, sewing, children's hair accessories, pins, makeup, bead, jewlwey, wash tape, stationary, sticker, tool, small, nails, etc. Makes everything from Arts&Crafts supplies to medicines organized and easy to find due to MULTI-FUNCTION STORAGE BOX adopt a reasonable three-layer separation stepped design. The overall color of this organiser box is a beautiful combination of blue and purple! Designed to provide you with a more effective storage method, enabling you to become a storage expert in a variety of occasions such as home, car, school, gym, travel, office, hospital, etc. Everything is in sight Find what you need in the fastest time , the trays are attached to the plastic tool box itself by some brackets. When you open the lid, various items will be clearly presented in front of you. Especially when used as a medicine storage box , this first aid storage box saves you from hunting through draws for medicine, thermometer, etc. Powerful Storage Capacity The craft organiser to keep your essentials organized, completely solve the disorder of items. Discover more storage possibilities, such as wrapping paper storage box, barbie storage box, sewing organiser, cosmetic storage box, bead storage, kids storage boxes and diamond painting storage, etc. Three-Tray Design,Easy to Access The tool storage box adopts a layered and separated stepped design with the ingenious space layout meets the storage needs of different sizes, and the classification is clear. 180° Expand The trays are attached to the craft box itself by some brackets, and retract/open up to reveal each layer when you open the lid. After the 3 Layer Storage Box is opened, it will lie on the table steadily, no need to worry about tipping over when picking up items.
